mapper.sql: id, dict_name, dict_type, status, remark, deleted, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_dict_type WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM sys_dict_type WHERE dict_type = #{dictType} AND deleted = 0

SELECT FROM sys_dict_type
deleted = 0
AND (dict_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR dict_type LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_dict_type (dict_name, dict_type, status, remark, deleted, created_by, updated_by) VALUES (#{dictName}, #{dictType}, #{status}, #{remark}, 0, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_dict_type SET dict_name = #{dictName}, dict_type = #{dictType}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, updated_at = NOW(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_dict_type SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
